title: Master Prompt – Realistic Handwritten Study Notes
content:
Create an ultra-realistic handwritten study note on a clean white A4 notebook paper. The final output must look exactly like a real page written by a student using black, blue, green, and red gel pens.

Topic

[TOPIC]

Content

Include the following:
[ITEMS]

Design Style

- 100% realistic human handwriting (not digital fonts)
- Natural handwriting with slight imperfections and varying letter sizes
- Clean, neat, premium study-note appearance
- Looks like scanned or photographed handwritten notes
- White notebook paper with subtle paper texture
- Small natural pen pressure variations
- Straight but slightly imperfect writing alignment
- Color coding:
  - Black: Main text
  - Blue: Function names / keywords
  - Green: Examples / formulas
  - Red: Important notes, warnings, highlights
- Number each section inside hand-drawn circles.
- Use hand-drawn boxes, arrows, underlines, brackets, separators, and callouts.
- Add small doodles such as stars, light bulbs, check marks, sticky-note icons, and simple sketches where appropriate.
- Organize everything in a balanced grid layout with equal spacing.
- Keep excellent readability with no overlapping text.
- Maintain consistent margins around all sides.
- Leave comfortable white space.

Header

Create a large handwritten title with colorful highlights and subtle decoration.

Each Section Should Include

1. Item Name
2. Short explanation (1–2 lines)
3. Syntax or Formula (if applicable)
4. Small practical example
5. Important tip (if relevant)

Overall Look

The page should resemble premium handwritten notes made by an expert instructor for exam preparation. It must feel authentic, aesthetic, organized, and easy to memorize.

Image Quality

- Ultra HD
- High resolution
- Sharp text
- Soft natural lighting
- Flat-lay top-down view
- Scan-quality appearance
- No watermark
- No logo
- No printed fonts
- No AI-style typography
- No spelling mistakes
- No cropped content
- Entire page fully visible

Language: [LANGUAGE]

The handwriting must appear completely human-written, visually attractive, and suitable for printing as a professional study handout.
